articles.title: iPhone 20 Renders Reveal Apple’s Next-Generation Design, With Details Like Silicon-Anode Battery, A21 SoC, HBM RAM & More Mentioned - Wccftech
articles.description: A video render of the iPhone 20 not only reveals its design, but specifications details like new battery technology have also been shared
articles.content: The quad-curved display belonging to the iPhone 20 has finally been showcased in the latest renders, as Apple is rumored to announce its 20th-anniversary edition at next years keynote. In addition to… [+2319 chars]
